title: Defensive Combat Posture
summary: Configuring ship orientation to minimize incoming damage.
details: When outgunned, angle strongest armor toward enemy. Rotate to distribute damage across multiple armor sections rather than concentrating on one. Present smallest profile when possible - edge-on reduces hit probability. Use terrain and debris for cover. Prioritize survival over kills. Defensive posture buys time for reinforcements or creates opportunity for withdrawal.
annotations: Survival often matters more than destruction.
Know which armor sections are strongest on your ship.
